name: fish_player_99
label: Fish
advice: Stations river calls. Bluff rarely; value bet thin pairs heavily.

name: nit_reg_37
label: Nit
advice: Folds to 3-bets at 80% rate. Attack their opens in late position constantly.

name: solid_pro_scorza
label: Solid Reg
advice: Maintains GTO open baselines. Exploit via blind defense adjustments.

name: villain_crusher
label: LAG Reg
advice: Heavy 3-bettor from blinds. Tighten your BTN RFI range and 4-bet value hands.

name: whale_caller
label: Whale
advice: Limp-calls preflop with 80% of hands. Isolate to 4x preflop, C-bet every flop.

name: loose_cannon
label: Maniac
advice: Over-bluffs postflop. Check-call top pairs and induce river jams. Never fold premium draws.

name: sunday_grinder
label: Solid Reg
advice: Tight preflop, respects large river action. Turn bluff-raises are effective here.

name: shark_reg
label: LAG Reg
advice: Defends blinds wide. Steal smaller from BTN (2.0x) and check back low dry boards.

name: muck_master
label: Weak Tight
advice: C-bets flop but folds to raises. Raise flop leads with backdoors to win pot.

name: tilt_machine
label: Tilter
advice: Opens wide under tilt pressure. Value bet big. Do not attempt to bluff him off pairs.
